description: Mechanical verification registry for documented issues. Source of truth for bug existence proof.

issues.summary: PluginManifest/PluginCast traits in shared crate — legacy but used by tests
Test infrastructure uses legacy mock plugins
mcp.rs exceeds 1500 lines, needs refactoring into separate modules
Heartbeat update error silently swallowed with .ok()
Memory timeout Duration::from_secs(5) repeated without constant
SSE /api/events and /api/history lack auth and rate limiting
Revoked API key cache has no TTL (unbounded growth)
Exception messages leak internal details to MCP clients
HTTP client not explicitly closed in search providers
LLM prompt building duplicated between ollama and common
Global _active_model not protected by asyncio lock
Python MCP dependencies not locked (no requirements.lock)
useEffect dependency may cause stale closure in useStatusManager
list_memories negative limit bypasses 500-row cap
Vector search dimension mismatch silently skipped without logging
MCP tool arguments not type-checked before use
Embedding HTTP port not range-validated at startup
No unit tests for Python MCP servers
No test coverage for YOLO mode functionality
YOLO mode state not persisted across kernel restarts (in-memory only)
YOLO dashboard warning does not clarify scope (MCP connection only, not tool execution)
call_server_tool() bypasses kernel-side tool validation (defense-in-depth gap)
Anti-spoofing only overwrites agent_id when key already present (conditional bypass)
Approval gate hardcoded to execute_command only, ignores other sandboxed tools
Approval timeout and user-deny share single catch-all match arm (no audit differentiation)
YOLO mode auto-approves commands with no audit log (observability gap)
Kernel sandbox validator lacks NFKC normalization (Unicode bypass possible)
AgentConsole lacks key prop — switching agents leaks isTyping state (shows Thinking on wrong agent)
handle_message ignores ClotoMessage.target_agent field — routes via metadata only, causing silent misrouting
SystemHandler runs inside dispatch_event causing event loop deadlock — approval cards delayed 60s+
MGP error codes use wrong ranges — all in 1000-1999 instead of §14.3 ranges (2000-5099)
mgp/stream/cancel sent as notification instead of Layer 3 RPC method (§12.7)
Trust level Standard maps to Safe risk, spec §4.6 says Standard→Moderate
Validator→risk mapping matches non-spec 'dangerous', missing readonly/network_restricted/code_safety/none (§4.6)
Permission→risk derivation uses single bool, lacks filesystem.write→moderate granularity (§4.6)
mgp/permission/await sent as notification instead of Layer 3 RPC method (§3.5)
mgp/permission/grant sent as notification instead of Layer 3 RPC method (§3.6)
Audit events use flat actor_id/target_id strings, spec §6.3 requires nested actor/target objects
HealthMonitor uses legacy auto_restart bool, ignores LifecycleManager restart policies/backoff (§11.6)
MGP version negotiation has no semver compatibility check (§2.4 rule 4)
CLIENT_EXTENSIONS missing 'progress' extension declared in spec §2.2 (§12.6)
health.status response uses 'state' field instead of spec §11.3 'status', missing uptime_secs/resources/checks
lifecycle.shutdown response format diverges from spec §11.4 — returns status/draining not accepted/pending_requests
events.subscribe response returns channels/server_id, spec §13.2 requires subscribed/unsupported fields
events.replay schema requires only subscription_id, spec §13.6 requires both subscription_id and after_seq
Lifecycle notification uses 'from'/'to' fields, spec §11.5 requires 'previous_state'/'new_state'
drain_server sends non-standard 'notifications/mgp.lifecycle.draining' — spec §11.5 only defines 'notifications/mgp.lifecycle'
Callback dedup ignores duplicate instead of re-sending recorded response per spec §13.4
StreamAssembler detects gaps but notifications/mgp.stream.gap is never sent (§12.9)
Permission grants use flat format only, scoped grants (§3.7) not implemented
Delegated execution (§5.6) not implemented — no delegation chain verification in call_server_tool
llm_completion callback type not specially routed to LLM provider (§13.4)
health.ping response missing uptime_secs field required by spec §11.3
lifecycle.shutdown schema missing 'reason' in required array (spec §11.4 requires it)
events.subscribe schema adds server_id to required — spec §13.2 only requires channels
events.replay executor ignores subscription_id parameter — spec §13.6 scopes replay by subscription
events.replay response missing has_more/truncated fields (spec §13.6)
audit.replay response uses 'entries' key instead of spec §6.3 'events', missing has_more/next_seq
stream.pace uses 'max_chunks_per_sec' — spec §12.8 field name is 'max_chunks_per_second'
Legacy auto_restart: bool field remains in McpServerConfig alongside restart_policy (redundant)
notifications/mgp.event delivery missing timestamp field (spec §13.3)
health.ping/status always returns uptime_secs: null — no connection time tracking (spec §11.3)
Callback type field reads callback_type instead of spec type field (S13.4)
Event delivery uses nested _mgp.seq instead of spec flat key (S13.3)
Event replay response missing truncated field per spec (S13.6)
build_mgp_error nests recovery under _mgp.recovery instead of flat _mgp (S14.4)
send_pace has extra pause field and missing reason field (S12.8)
lifecycle.shutdown schema missing enum constraint on reason field (S11.4)
mgp.access.query schema required missing server_id per spec (S5.4)
stream.cancel kernel tool missing reason parameter, hardcoded user_cancelled (S12.7)
events.subscribe schema required channels but executor requires server_id (S13.2)
Delegation anti-spoofing missing: no original_actor/delegated_via verification (S5.6.3)
issues.pattern: is not a known active agent \(MGP §5\.6\.3

issues.summary: Delegation permission intersection not implemented (S5.6.1)
Event replay uses seq instead of _mgp.seq (S13.6)
Health status not-found uses state instead of status field (S11.3)
Tier 4 Discovery schemas (mgp.discovery.*) missing from kernel_tool_schemas — invisible to agents
Session tool schemas (mgp.tools.session/session.evict) missing from kernel_tool_schemas — invisible to agents
handle_think_with_tools missing sanitization for role:tool entries in tool_history (latent dot-name risk)
Agent creation does not grant MCP access to selected engine/memory servers — server_grant entries missing from mcp_access_control
Agent deletion does not clean up CPersona memories/profiles/episodes, mcp_access_control, or trusted_commands — orphaned data causes persona leakage on agent re-creation
AgentConsole.tsx: msg.metadata.elapsed_secs rendered as JSX child but typed as {} (not ReactNode)
ContentBlockView.tsx: parsed.hint is unknown type used as JSX child without type narrowing
ErrorBoundary.tsx and api.ts: import.meta.env not typed — missing Vite client type reference
McpAccessSummaryBar.tsx: AgentCount t prop typed as (key,opts?)=>string, incompatible with i18next TFunction
test/setup.ts: global.HTMLMediaElement references fail — missing global type declaration for test env
test/setup.ts: mock object cast as MediaStream lacks required properties — needs unknown intermediate cast
Agent config avatar upload bypasses Save button — api.uploadAvatar called immediately on file select
Agent config avatar delete bypasses Save button — api.deleteAvatar called immediately on click
KernelMonitor.tsx uses text-[8px] violating CLAUDE.md minimum text size rule (text-[9px])
McpServerList.tsx uses text-[8px] violating CLAUDE.md minimum text size rule (text-[9px])
McpServersPage.tsx uses text-[8px] violating CLAUDE.md minimum text size rule (text-[9px])
Spinner.tsx uses dynamic Tailwind classes w-${size} h-${size} — purged at build time, causing missing styles
useTheme useEffect has empty dependency array but uses preference — theme switching broken after init
api.ts fetchJson/mutate lack AbortController signal — requests complete after component unmount
useEventStream handler uses any type — loss of type safety on SSE event data
api.ts response transformations use (b: any) and (m: any) — unsafe type assertions
AgentConsole.tsx onSend inline arrow function in JSX prop causes unnecessary re-renders
AgentTerminal.tsx uses array index as React key — unstable keys cause reconciliation issues
main.tsx pickRandom useCallback uses BOOT_LINES.length but BOOT_LINES not in dependency array
ChatInputBar.tsx setTimeout without clearTimeout cleanup — timer fires after unmount
AdvancedSection.tsx has hardcoded English strings not wrapped in i18n t() calls
LlmProvidersSection.tsx has hardcoded English strings not wrapped in i18n t() calls
SecuritySection.tsx has hardcoded English strings not wrapped in i18n t() calls
DisplaySection.tsx has hardcoded English strings not wrapped in i18n t() calls
LogSection.tsx has hardcoded English strings not wrapped in i18n t() calls
ErrorBoundary.tsx has hardcoded 'System Error' string not wrapped in i18n t() call
SkeletonThinking.tsx has hardcoded 'Thinking...' string not wrapped in i18n t() call
McpServerSettingsTab.tsx has hardcoded placeholder strings not wrapped in i18n t() calls
CronJobs.tsx uses native alert() instead of UI component for error display
index.css defines shimmer-line class that is never referenced by any component
index.css defines thought-fade animation that is never referenced by any component
agentColor() ignores _agent parameter and always returns getBrandHex() constant
KernelMonitor.tsx destructures isLoading from useAgents() but never uses it
CustomCursor.tsx useEffect has empty dependency array but captures values that may change
AgentConsole.tsx scroll-to-bottom threshold hardcoded as magic number 50
CommandApprovalCard.tsx approval timeout hardcoded as magic number 60
MemoryCore.tsx debounce delay hardcoded as magic number 300ms
tailwind.config.js uses legacy 'karin' color naming instead of 'cloto'
AgentConsole.tsx contains console.log statement left in production code
useStorage.ts has empty catch {} blocks that silently swallow storage errors

P1: memory.cpersona server ID hard-coded in handlers
P1: parse_cpersona_result kernel parses plugin response format
P1: vision.capture server ID hard-coded in agents handler
P1: vision.capture server ID hard-coded in system handler

P1: memory.cpersona DB config initialized at startup

P1: Default consensus engines hard-coded

P1: system.consensus agent ID hard-coded
P1: find_memory_server hard-codes store+recall tool requirement
P1: find_memory assumes memory trait in registry
P1: consensus prefix routing hard-coded in system handler
P1: memory recall tool contract hard-coded in system handler
P2: Kernel-native tool names bypass access control
P2: delete_agent_data tool name hard-coded
P2: think/think_with_tools tool names hard-coded
P2: Memory tool names hard-coded (store, list_memories, etc.)
P4: avatar_path stored as dedicated schema column
P4: vrm_path stored as dedicated schema column
P4: engine_routing metadata deserialized by kernel
P4: avatar columns read by kernel and converted to metadata
P4: preferred_memory modified by kernel migration SQL
P4: avatar_description column added to kernel schema
P5: YOLO mode audit status indistinguishable from human-approved
P5: execute_tool has no permission check for global calls
P5: MCP servers HTTP restriction via proxy-only isolation (MGP §8-10)
P5: Runtime capability injection via mgp/permission/grant RPC
P8: PermissionRequested event variant now defined and emitted
P8: Permission escalation connected — approve triggers mgp/permission/grant
P8: SecurityGuard UI exists, activated by PermissionRequested events
P9: StdioTransport has no explicit Drop impl
P9: Shutdown handler does not drain MCP servers
G1.3: McpClientManager has 3 fragmented RwLocks
G1.3: PluginRegistry has 2 fragmented RwLocks
G1.3: ConsensusOrchestrator has 2 fragmented RwLocks
G1.3: Mixed sync/async RwLock types in AppState
G1.4: parse_mcp_recall_result does not sort by timestamp
G1.4: Context passed to engine without chronological ordering
G1.5: list_agents has no agent_type filtering
P9: Default restart policy values differ from documentation
LLM speak tool produces different text than displayed response
VOICEVOX accent_phrases field name mismatch causes empty viseme timeline
Dashboard sends image attachments via postChat which skips DB persistence, causing maybe_analyze_images to find zero attachments
CRON messages invisible in chat: user_id='system' excluded by get_chat_messages filter
Session reset button in AgentConsole uses stale onComplete closure in useLongPress hook
DELETE chat messages ignores user_id='system' rows — reset button deletes nothing when all messages are from CRON
issues.pattern: DELETE FROM chat_messages WHERE agent_id = \? AND user_id = \?

issues.summary: AgentConsole SSE event.data properties accessed without type assertions cause 6 TypeScript compile errors
ensure_mcp_venv skips dependency install when venv already exists — ddgs and other late-added packages never installed
search_status health check reports DuckDuckGo as always reachable without verifying ddgs module is importable
resolve_servers_dir_from_config returns None despite valid mcp.toml [paths].servers — toml::Value generic parsing fails silently
Avatar upload save button spinner hangs forever — analyze_avatar MCP call has no timeout
Avatar deletion undone by updateAgent race — deleteAvatar removes avatar_path but updateAgent re-inserts it from stale agent.metadata
